Class GameSelectionState

java.lang.Object
View.Client.States.ConnectedState
View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedInState
View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn.GameSelectionState
All Implemented Interfaces:
ClientState
public final class GameSelectionState extends LoggedInState
Represents the state of the client when the user is logged in and can select games. This state allows the user to create or join games and view the list of available games.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private Integer[]
    gamesList
    The list of available games represented by their IDs.

    chooseProtocol, connect, isDone, login, net_Fly, net_JoinFailed, net_JoinSuccess, net_Leave, net_LoginFailed, net_LoginSuccess, net_Reward, net_Start, net_ViewCardDeck, updateGame, viewCard, viewCardDeck, viewComponent, viewFlightBoard, viewPlayers, viewRewards, viewShipBoard, viewTiles

  • Field Details

    • gamesList

      private Integer[] gamesList
      The list of available games represented by their IDs. This array is updated when the server sends a new list of games.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameSelectionState

      public GameSelectionState(Network network, String username)
      Constructs a GameSelectionState with the specified network and username. This constructor initializes the state by sending an UpdateListMessage to fetch the list of games.
      Parameters:
      network - The network connection used for communication.
      username - The username of the logged-in user.

  • Method Details

    • create

      public ClientState create(MatchLevel matchLevel)
      Returns the list of available games. This method provides access to the current list of game IDs that the user can join or view.
      Parameters:
      matchLevel - The level of the match to be created.
      Returns:
      An array of integers representing the IDs of available games.

    • join

      public ClientState join(int gameId)
      Joins a game with the specified game ID. This method sends a JoinGameMessage to the server and returns a new state based on the response.
      Parameters:
      gameId - The ID of the game to join.
      Returns:
      A new ClientState representing the result of the join operation.

    • updateList

      public ClientState updateList(Integer[] newGamesList)
      Updates the list of available games with a new list provided by the server. This method replaces the current gamesList with the new list.
      Parameters:
      newGamesList - An array of integers representing the new list of game IDs.
      Returns:
      The updated ClientState with the new games list.

    • getAvailableCommands

      public List<String> getAvailableCommands()
      Returns a list of available commands that can be executed in this state. This method provides the commands related to game selection, such as updating the list, joining a game, and creating a game.
      Returns:
      A list of strings representing the available commands.

    • list

      public void list()
      Lists the available games in a user-friendly format. This method collects the game IDs from the gamesList and displays them using the Client's view.
